word: H4205 - מָזֹור - mâzôwr - maw-zore' - Bound up

sections.paragraph:
Original: מזר מזור

Transliteration: mâzôr mâzôr

Phonetic: maw-zore'

BDB Definition:

  1. wound
    1. wound (figuratively of injury to or sufferings of Israel or Judah)

Origin: from H2115 in the sense of binding

TWOT entry: 543c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
